task_completion.description: Open the raw council minutes document in a word processor (LibreOffice Writer).
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Writer window is open displaying the unformatted text of the council meeting transcript. The window title or file path should indicate 'council_minutes_raw.odt'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Speaker Label' paragraph style with the required properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Paragraph Style dialog box for 'Speaker Label' showing settings such as Bold font, 6pt Spacing Above, 'Keep with next paragraph' checked, and/or 'Minute Text' set as the Next Style. Alternatively, 'Speaker Label' is visible in the Styles sidebar.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Minute Text' paragraph style with the required properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Paragraph Style dialog box for 'Minute Text' showing settings such as 0.5 inch (1.27 cm) Left Indent, Regular font, and/or 'Speaker Label' set as the Next Style. Alternatively, 'Minute Text' is visible in the Styles sidebar.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'Speaker Label' style to all speaker names (lines ending in ':').
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document text shows speaker lines (e.g., names ending with ':') formatted in Bold. The Styles sidebar or formatting toolbar should show 'Speaker Label' is active when the cursor is on these lines.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'Minute Text' style to all dialogue paragraphs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document text shows dialogue paragraphs indented by 0.5 inches (1.27 cm) with regular font weight. The Styles sidebar or formatting toolbar should show 'Minute Text' is active when the cursor is on these paragraphs.
A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'council_minutes_formatted.odt' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory, or the main LibreOffice window title bar updating to 'council_minutes_formatted.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Writer GUI to perform the formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Writer graphical interface (menus, style dialogs, sidebars) rather than terminal commands or Python scripts modifying the ODT file directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually created and applied paragraph styles rather than manually formatting each line.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Styles sidebar (F11) or Paragraph Style dialogs are visible and used, rather than just clicking the 'Bold' or 'Increase Indent' buttons on the main toolbar for every paragraph.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the provided raw file rather than creating a new file from scratch and typing the text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The original text from 'council_minutes_raw.odt' is visible and being manipulated, rather than an empty document being filled with copy-pasted or manually typed text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/Documents/council_minutes_raw.odt. Output file: /home/ga/Documents/council_minutes_formatted.odt. Required styles: 'Speaker Label' (Bold, 6pt spacing above, Keep with next paragraph, Next Style: 'Minute Text') and 'Minute Text' (0.5 inch / 1.27 cm Left Indent, Regular font, Next Style: 'Speaker Label'). There are 14 speaker lines ending with ':' that should have the 'Speaker Label' style applied, and the subsequent dialogue paragraphs should have the 'Minute Text' style applied.
